policy_name: All authenticated users can read invoices

check_expression: ((get_current_user_role() = 'ASIST'::text) AND (numero_cuota IS NOT NULL) AND (student_id IS NOT NULL) AND ((owner_id IS NULL) OR (owner_id = auth.uid())))

using_expression: ((get_current_user_role() = 'ASIST'::text) AND (numero_cuota IS NOT NULL) AND (student_id IS NOT NULL) AND (status IS DISTINCT FROM 'paid'::text))
check_expression: ((get_current_user_role() = 'ASIST'::text) AND (numero_cuota IS NOT NULL) AND (student_id IS NOT NULL) AND (status = 'paid'::text) AND (payment_date IS NOT NULL) AND (amount IS NOT NULL))

check_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM ((enrollment_documents d
     JOIN enrollments e ON ((e.id = d.enrollment_id)))

  WHERE ((d.id = signatures.enrollment_document_id) AND (g.owner_id = auth.uid()))))

using_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM guardians g
  WHERE ((g.owner_id = auth.uid()) AND (((pre_receipts.enrollment_id IS NOT NULL) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM enrollments e
          WHERE ((e.id = pre_receipts.enrollment_id) AND (e.guardian_id = g.id))))) OR ((pre_receipts.student_id IS NOT NULL) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM student_guardian sg
          WHERE ((sg.student_id = pre_receipts.student_id) AND (sg.guardian_id = g.id)))))))))

policy_name: Guardians can view their own cheques
using_expression:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (enrollments
     JOIN guardians ON ((enrollments.guardian_id = guardians.id)))
  WHERE ((enrollments.id = cheques.enrollment_id) AND (guardians.owner_id = auth.uid()))))

     JOIN guardians ON ((enrollments.guardian_id = guardians.id)))
  WHERE ((enrollments.id = cheques.enrollment_id) AND (guardians.owner_id = auth.uid()))))
